diagnostics.description: Every diagnostic conclusion must cite specific evidence (event ID, counter value, log entry)
BSOD stop codes must match known Microsoft documentation or be tagged [SPEC]
All referenced Windows versions, build numbers, and KB articles must be verifiable

registry.description: All registry paths must follow valid HKEY structure and be verified before modification
Every registry write operation must include a backup command
All destructive operations must be tagged [DESTRUCTIVE]

security.description: CIS benchmark control IDs must match actual CIS Windows 11 benchmark or be tagged [SPEC]
Never recommend disabling security features without explicit justification and [DESTRUCTIVE] tag

general.description: Every factual assertion must have a claim tag
[SPEC] claims must never be presented as [OBS] or [DRV]
Complex state must be in tables or diagnostic trees, not prose paragraphs

known_drift_patterns.description: May identify more issues than actually present, creating false positives from normal system state
known_drift_patterns.mitigation: Require specific evidence for each finding. Cross-reference against known-good baselines.

known_drift_patterns.description: May mix Windows 10 and Windows 11 specific guidance
known_drift_patterns.mitigation: Always verify OS version applicability. Tag version-specific advice.

audhd_considerations.context_window_usage: Excellent for full system diagnostic. Keep scope explicit.
audhd_considerations.monotropism_alignment: One subsystem at a time. Explicit scope boundaries.

known_drift_patterns.description: May miss secondary symptoms in rapid triage mode
known_drift_patterns.mitigation: Flag if symptoms suggest multiple root causes. Escalate to gemini-3.1-pro-preview.

known_drift_patterns.description: May generate plausible but non-existent registry paths
known_drift_patterns.mitigation: Validate all registry paths against known HKEY structure. Tag unverified paths as [SPEC].

known_drift_patterns.description: May reference PowerShell cmdlets that do not exist
known_drift_patterns.mitigation: Verify cmdlet existence against known module list. Prefer well-established cmdlets.

audhd_considerations.monotropism_alignment: Divergent phase only. Switch to convergent model after.

known_drift_patterns.description: May create unnecessarily complex remediation plans for simple issues
known_drift_patterns.mitigation: Set explicit complexity threshold. Prefer simplest effective solution.

known_drift_patterns.description: May use deprecated WMI classes instead of CIM equivalents
known_drift_patterns.mitigation: Prefer Get-CimInstance over Get-WmiObject. Flag deprecated usage.

known_drift_patterns.description: May omit try/catch blocks in complex scripts
known_drift_patterns.mitigation: Enforce error handling template. Require -ErrorAction Stop on critical commands.

known_drift_patterns.description: May verify configurations as correct based on common patterns rather than specific context
known_drift_patterns.mitigation: Never sole verifier for security-critical configurations. Cross-validate.

error_handling.on_hallucination_detected: Tag as [SPEC], flag to operator, do not present as fact
error_handling.on_energy_crash: Route to nano model, JSON-only, binary output, escalate immediately
error_handling.on_destructive_operation: Require explicit operator confirmation before proceeding
